events.headline: Turn every keynote into a conversation.
events.subheadline: Run live polls, Q&A rankings, and sentiment checks across hundreds of participants — Qesto keeps your audience engaged from opening remarks to closing session.

painPoints.heading: The challenges every event organiser knows

passiveAudiences.title: Passive audiences
passiveAudiences.desc: Attendees scroll their phones while speakers talk to a quiet room. Engagement drops off after the first 10 minutes.

slowFeedback.title: Slow feedback loops
slowFeedback.desc: Post-event surveys arrive too late to act on. You only find out what went wrong after people have left.

silentMajority.title: Silent majority
silentMajority.desc: Only the loudest voices get heard in open Q&A. Most attendees never feel safe enough to share their real opinions.

features.heading: Everything you need to run a live event people remember

bottomCta.heading: Your next event starts here.
bottomCta.subheading: Set up in under 5 minutes, no app install required for attendees.

hr.headline: Feel the pulse of your people — not just the data.
hr.subheadline: Run anonymous pulse surveys, onboarding check-ins, and engagement sessions that employees actually respond to. AI surfaces what your team is really thinking.

painPoints.heading: The gaps annual surveys can't fill

features.heading: A better way to listen at scale

bottomCta.heading: Build a culture where everyone has a voice.
bottomCta.subheading: Start free — no HR software integration required.

nonprofit.headline: Give every member a voice that counts.
nonprofit.subheadline: Run transparent votes, consent checks, and community feedback sessions that keep your members engaged and your board accountable — all on a privacy-first platform.

features.heading: Tools built for transparent, inclusive decisions

consulting.headline: Workshops that actually move the room.
consulting.subheadline: Replace sticky notes and show-of-hands with structured real-time data. Qesto helps facilitators surface alignment, expose hidden disagreements, and close workshops with clear decisions.

features.heading: Every tool a facilitator needs, in one session link

bottomCta.heading: Run better workshops, close with data.

aiInsights.headline: AI Insights — questions written in seconds, patterns found automatically.
aiInsights.subheadline: Qesto's on-device AI generates question sets from a brief, detects themes across sessions, and surfaces what your team is really thinking — without a single byte leaving your infrastructure.

bottomCta.heading: Stop staring at a blank question list.
bottomCta.subheading: Let AI draft it. You refine it. Your team answers it.

livePolling.headline: Live polling that moves at the speed of your room.
livePolling.subheadline: Multiple choice, scales, rankings, open questions, and consent votes — all updating in real time on every participant's device and your presenter screen simultaneously.

howItWorks.heading: From question to result in under 10 seconds

bottomCta.heading: Your audience is waiting to be heard.
bottomCta.subheading: No app install. No waiting. Just join and vote.

privacy.headline: Your team's responses stay yours — always.
privacy.subheadline: Anonymity modes, GDPR consent logging, and on-device AI inference mean participants can speak honestly and you can prove it. No third-party model providers ever see your data.

howItWorks.heading: Privacy is architecture, not a checkbox

bottomCta.heading: Honest responses start with trusted infrastructure.
bottomCta.subheading: Privacy is on by default — you never have to turn it on.

teamMeetings.headline: Meetings where everyone contributes, not just the loudest.
teamMeetings.subheadline: Replace silent nodding with structured input. Qesto makes standups, retrospectives, and decision meetings faster, more inclusive, and actually useful.

features.heading: Qesto tools for better team meetings

scenarios.heading: Meeting formats that work well with Qesto

bottomCta.heading: Turn your next meeting into a real conversation.

workshops.headline: Facilitate without the sticky notes.
workshops.subheadline: Real-time structured input replaces physical props and messy whiteboards. Run ideation, prioritisation, and consent rounds from a single session link — and leave with exportable results.

features.heading: One session link for every workshop format

bottomCta.heading: Great facilitation leaves evidence.
bottomCta.subheading: Qesto turns workshop conversations into structured, shareable results.

training.headline: Check understanding while you still have the room.
training.subheadline: Run formative knowledge checks, confidence surveys, and reflection questions mid-session. Find out what participants actually understood — not what they said they understood.

bottomCta.heading: Train smarter — check understanding while it matters.
